relationships: ber:Ur tezmir ara ad tili tesɛa nnig simraw n yiseggasen
ber:Yal taddart deg Tmurt n Yizwawen tesɛa tamesgida
ber:Yal taddart deg Tmurt n Leqbayel tesɛa tamesgida
ber:Sandra d tameṭṭut yernu tesɛa kumraw sin n yiseggasen
ber:Tella d tilemẓit yeččuṛen d tudert, acebbub-nnes d aras yernu tesɛa simraw-sḍis n yiseggasen deg leɛmeṛ-nnes
ber:Tɛawed zzwaj asmi ay tesɛa azal n kuẓet n tmerwin ed semmus n yiseggasen
ber:Tamurt n Yizwawen, deg Dzayer, tesɛa imerdulen d ihuskayen
ber:Nettat daymen tesɛa ccɣel deg wussan n yimalas
ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel drusit yiɣbula igamanen i tesɛa
ber:Tɛawed zzwaj asmi ay tesɛa azal n xemsa ed ṛebɛin n yiseggasen
